name: Large Solid Canvas Storage Basket - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Stay organized by keeping your everyday items in this Solid Canvas Storage Basket from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. Made of cotton, this round storage basket features an open top to easily store your essentials — from wool balls and books to throws and laundry. Plus, it's designed in a brown hue to match your existing decor theme. Add this functional basket to your home to keep your living space organized.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
